subject: Re: Fwd:
body: I'm in Astana. Meet tomorrow with the President. Passing through IL only for six hours on Friday on my way to meet with you in Florida. Tough life for the oldies.
body_html: <html><head><meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8"></head><body dir="auto"><div>I'm in Astana. Meet tomorrow with the President. Passing through IL only for six hours on Friday on my way to meet with you in Florida. Tough life for the oldies.
